    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Glossary"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "Belgian municipal and immigration terms used in this project. English is primary in code; UI may show FR/NL labels later."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## Registers"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "| Term | Code / enum | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "|------|-------------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "| **Population Register** | &#96;RegisterTarget.PopulationRegister&#96; | Primary register for Belgian nationals and persons with established residence rights |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "| **Foreigners Register** | &#96;RegisterTarget.ForeignersRegister&#96; | Non-Belgians registered with residence documentation |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "| **Waiting Register** | &#96;RegisterTarget.WaitingRegister&#96; | Persons awaiting decision or verification |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "| **Special Register** | &#96;RegisterTarget.SpecialRegister&#96; | Diplomats and others under special rules |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "| **National Register** | — | Central population register (RN/RR); municipalities read/write via official systems — **stubbed** in this project |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "| **BIS number** | &#96;BisNumber&#96; | Identification number for persons not (yet) in the National Register; may convert to NR number |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "## Identification numbers"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "| Term | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "|------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "| **National Register number** (NN/NISS) | 11-digit Belgian identification number assigned upon registration |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "| **BIS number** | Temporary or administrative identifier before full NR registration |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "## Roles (actors)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "| Term | Code role | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "|------|-----------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "| **Reception officer** | &#96;ReceptionOfficer&#96; | Front desk; determines visit reason and routing |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "| **Population officer** | &#96;PopulationOfficer&#96; | Handles registration, identity, address, decision |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "| **Police clerk** | &#96;PoliceClerk&#96; | Records residence verification outcomes |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "| **Citizen** | — | Person requesting registration (not a system user in early phases) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "## Residence documents (simplified)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\u003e **Accuracy disclaimer:** descriptions below are simplified for this educational project. Belgian residence card letters were reorganised in 2021 (C→K, D→L, E→EU, E+→EU+). Verify against official Immigration Office (IBZ/DVZ) sources before encoding legal rules as code."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "| Term | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "|------|-------------|"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "public void RequestPoliceVerification()  // requires IdentityEstablished + AddressDeclared"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "public void RecordPoliceResult(PoliceVerificationResult result)  // → UnderReview"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "public void Approve(OfficerId officer, RegisterTarget register)  // requires full checklist + positive police result"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "public void Reject(OfficerId officer, RejectionReason reason)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "public void ConfirmRegistration()  // Approved → Registered"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "Invalid transitions raise &#96;InvalidRegistrationTransitionException&#96;. The officer review screen renders the checklist directly from domain state — no ad-hoc UI booleans."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "## Bounded contexts and integration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "See [DOMAIN.md](./DOMAIN.md) for full context map. Between contexts:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "| Integration style | Example |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "|-------------------|---------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "| Same aggregate / case file | Identity and address steps on &#96;RegistrationCase&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "| Reference by ID | &#96;PoliceVerificationRequest&#96; linked to &#96;RegistrationCaseId&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "| Domain event | &#96;RegistrationConfirmed&#96; → stub “notify tax administration” |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "| Anti-corruption layer | External “Immigration Office” stub returns simplified decisions |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "Avoid a shared “God entity” table for Person that every module writes to."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "## Cross-cutting concerns"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "| Concern | Approach |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "|---------|----------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "| Validation | FluentValidation in Web slice; domain validates invariants in aggregates |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "| Mapping | Manual mapping for small DTOs; no AutoMapper unless mapping explodes |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "| Logging | &#96;ILogger\u003cT\u003e&#96; in handlers |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "| Time | &#96;TimeProvider&#96; (or &#96;ISystemClock&#96;) injected for testability |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "| Current user | &#96;ICurrentOfficer&#96; scoped service (fake auth in educational project) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "| Auditing | &#96;AuditEntry&#96; entity + EF interceptor or explicit &#96;case.RecordAudit(...)&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "| File uploads | Local filesystem in dev; abstract &#96;IDocumentStorage&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "## Authentication (educational simplification)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "Phase 1: role picker or fixed test users (&#96;ReceptionOfficer&#96;, &#96;PopulationOfficer&#96;, &#96;PoliceClerk&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "Phase 2+: ASP.NET Core Identity or OpenID Connect stub."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "Authorization checks live in handlers: &#96;if (!_currentOfficer.CanApproveRegistration) throw ...&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "## Database strategy"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "- **Development (Aspire):** PostgreSQL container started by AppHost; connection string injected into Web."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 311
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 266
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ARCHITECTURE.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3059174120426178

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Registration feature"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "The Registration bounded context manages first-registration procedures for the Population Department. A **RegistrationCase** aggregate tracks the intake workflow; related **Person** and **AdministrativeDocument** entities are created as the officer progresses through the case."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## Domain model"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "erDiagram"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    RegistrationCase ||--o| Person : \"PersonId\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    RegistrationCase ||--o| Household : \"RegistrationCaseId\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    RegistrationCase ||--o{ AdministrativeDocument : \"RegistrationCaseId\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    Household ||--o{ HouseholdMember : \"HouseholdId\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    RegistrationCase {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "        guid Id"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        enum Status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        enum VisitReason"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        guid AssignedOfficerId"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        guid PersonId"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        address DeclaredAddress"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        enum HousingSituation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        datetime OpenedAt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        checklist Checklist"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    Person {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        guid Id"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        string GivenName"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        string FamilyName"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        date BirthDate"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        string Nationality"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        guid LinkedRegisterRecordId"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        string BisNumber"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        string NationalRegisterNumber"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "        civilStatus CivilStatusRecord"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    Household {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "        guid Id"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        guid RegistrationCaseId"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    HouseholdMember {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        guid Id"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "        string GivenName"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "        string FamilyName"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        date BirthDate"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "        enum Role"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    AdministrativeDocument {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "        guid Id"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "        guid RegistrationCaseId"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "        enum DocumentType"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "        string FileName"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "        string StoragePath"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "        string ContentHash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "        guid UploadedByOfficerId"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "        datetime UploadedAt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "### Case status and checklist"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "| Status | Meaning |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "|--------|---------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "| &#96;Intake&#96; | Case opened; identity, residence, address, and documents can be collected |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "| &#96;AwaitingPoliceVerification&#96; | Sent to local police for residence check |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "| &#96;UnderReview&#96; | Police result recorded; officer evaluates the four core decisions |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "| &#96;Approved&#96;, &#96;Registered&#96;, &#96;Rejected&#96;, &#96;Suspended&#96; | See &#96;RegistrationCaseStatus&#96; and [GLOSSARY.md](../../GLOSSARY.md) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "The **checklist** tracks completeness flags (&#96;IdentityEstablished&#96;, &#96;LegalResidenceEstablished&#96;, &#96;AddressDeclared&#96;, &#96;AddressConfirmed&#96;, etc.) independently of status. Recording identity sets &#96;IdentityEstablished = true&#96;; residence policies set &#96;LegalResidenceEstablished&#96; when evidence passes validation; a **Confirmed** police result sets &#96;AddressConfirmed&#96;."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 72
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/features/registration/README.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.27095866203308105
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "| &#96;RegistrationCaseId&#96; | same | Strongly typed &#96;record&#96; wrapping &#96;Guid&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "| &#96;RegistrationCaseStatus&#96; | same | Enum; only &#96;Intake&#96; used so far |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "| &#96;IRegistrationCaseRepository&#96; | same | &#96;ListAsync&#96;, &#96;AddAsync&#96;, &#96;SaveChangesAsync&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "No lifecycle transitions, checklist flags, or domain events yet — those arrive in Phase 1+."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "### Infrastructure"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "- **&#96;MunicipalDbContext&#96;** — single DbSet for &#96;RegistrationCase&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "- **&#96;RegistrationCaseConfiguration&#96;** — maps to &#96;registration_cases&#96; with snake_case columns under PostgreSQL."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "- **&#96;RegistrationCaseRepository&#96;** — implements the domain port."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "- **&#96;InitialCreate&#96; migration** — creates empty &#96;registration_cases&#96; table."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "- **&#96;DependencyInjection.AddInfrastructure&#96;** — provider selection by connection string:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "  - SQLite (&#96;Data Source=...&#96;) → &#96;EnsureCreatedAsync()&#96; (tests)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "  - Npgsql → &#96;MigrateAsync()&#96; in Development (Aspire runs)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "Snake-case naming convention is applied for PostgreSQL via &#96;EFCore.NamingConventions&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "### Web"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "**Composition root** (&#96;Program.cs&#96;):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "1. ServiceDefaults + Infrastructure DI."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "2. Blazor Interactive Server + MudBlazor."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "3. Scoped &#96;ICurrentOfficer&#96; and &#96;ListRegistrationCasesHandler&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "4. Database initialization on startup."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "5. Razor components, registration API group, OpenAPI (Development), default health endpoints."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "**Auth (educational fake):**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "| Type | Role |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "|------|------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "| &#96;ICurrentOfficer&#96; | Current officer id, display name, role, &#96;CanApproveRegistration&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "| &#96;CurrentOfficer&#96; | Fixed demo officer; &#96;SetRole&#96; updates name and permissions |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "| &#96;OfficerRole&#96; | &#96;ReceptionOfficer&#96;, &#96;PopulationOfficer&#96;, &#96;PoliceClerk&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "| &#96;RoleSwitcher&#96; | MudSelect in app bar to switch roles at runtime |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "**UI:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "- &#96;MainLayout&#96; — MudBlazor shell with drawer nav, officer name, role switcher, Schaerbeek branding (&#96;#1B4F72&#96; primary)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "- &#96;RegistrationCaseList.razor&#96; — &#96;/registration/cases&#96;; calls handler directly; shows empty-state message pointing to Phase 1."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "- Home page and standard error/not-found pages from the Blazor template."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 146
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 103
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/phases/phase-0-foundation.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.27081719040870667
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "This is the prompt I gave to an AI:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "You are the head of the Population Department of a Belgian municipality. Ignore technology completely. Walk me through every step that happens when a foreign citizen comes to register, from entering the building to becoming officially registered. Describe every actor, every document, every validation, every decision, every exception, and every piece of information that employees need."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "This is the answer:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Below is how I would explain the process to a new manager joining the Population Department of a Belgian municipality. The exact implementation varies slightly between municipalities and depending on nationality (EU, non-EU, refugee, diplomat, etc.), but this reflects the general administrative workflow used in Belgium."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "# High-Level Goal"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "The purpose of a first registration is **not simply to create a record**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "The municipality must determine:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "1. Who is this person?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "2. Are they legally allowed to reside in Belgium?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "3. Do they actually live at the declared address?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "4. Under which legal status must they be registered?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "5. Which other administrations must be informed?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "Only after those questions are answered does the person officially become part of the Belgian population registers."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "# Phase 1 — Arrival at the Municipality"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "## Reception Desk"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "Actors:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "- Reception officer"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "- Citizen"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "The reception officer determines the reason for the visit."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "Examples:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "- First registration in Belgium"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "- Change of address"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "- EU registration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "- Family reunification"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "- Student registration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "- Birth declaration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "- Passport renewal"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "For a foreign citizen registering for the first time, the reception officer directs them to Population/Foreigners Office."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "# Phase 2 — Identity Verification"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "Actor:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "Population Officer"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "The officer first establishes identity."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "Requested documents may include:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "- Passport"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "- National ID card"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "- Visa"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "- Residence permit"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "- Residence decision"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "- Annex documents issued by Immigration Office"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "- Birth certificate"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "- Marriage certificate"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "- Divorce judgment"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "- Children's birth certificates"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 72
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./IDEA.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2528229057788849
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "| Decision | Primary data | Checklist flag / gate |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "|----------|--------------|-----------------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "| Identity certain? | &#96;Person&#96;, attached ID documents | &#96;IdentityEstablished&#96; — officer confirms during &#96;Intake&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "| Legal residence? | &#96;ResidenceCategory&#96;, permits | &#96;LegalResidenceEstablished&#96; — policy validation |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "| Address genuine? | &#96;DeclaredAddress&#96;, police result | &#96;AddressConfirmed&#96; — positive police verification |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "| Which register? | Policies on category + outcome | &#96;Approve(registerTarget)&#96; requires all flags resolved |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "Officer **decision screen** aggregates checklist flags computed from domain state, not ad-hoc UI booleans."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "## Reference data (not aggregates)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "Seed tables / enums:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "- &#96;RegisterType&#96;: PopulationRegister, ForeignersRegister, WaitingRegister, SpecialRegister"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "- &#96;ResidencePermitType&#96;: ACard, BCard, Annex15, …"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "- &#96;DocumentType&#96;: Passport, VisaD, RentalContract, …"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "- &#96;Municipality&#96;, &#96;Street&#96; (Schaerbeek subset for demos)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "- &#96;RejectionReason&#96;, &#96;SuspensionReason&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "## Person file (read model — later phase)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "Long term, a **PersonFile** read model consolidates everything IDEA lists under “Information maintained about the person.” Build this as a query/projection once multiple contexts exist — not as a writable mega-entity on day one."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "## Exception scenarios (backlog hooks)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "Each IDEA exception becomes a testable slice or domain rule:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "| Scenario | Behavior |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "|----------|----------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "| Duplicate identity | Block registration; open investigation flag |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "| Illegal stay | Reject; refer to immigration (status reason) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "| EU citizen | Lighter document policy |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "| Diplomat | Separate register rules |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "| Homeless | Reference address mechanism |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "| Refugee | Additional federal decision prerequisite |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "See [ROADMAP.md](./ROADMAP.md) for when each is implemented."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "## Ubiquitous language in code"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "Use Belgian/French-Dutch admin terms in **enum names and glossary**, English in **type and method names**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "- Code: &#96;ResidenceCategory.EuCitizen&#96;, &#96;RegisterTarget.ForeignersRegister&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "- UI: localized labels (FR/NL/EN later); start with English or bilingual FR/EN for Schaerbeek"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 287
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 235
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/DOMAIN.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.244390606880188
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Phase 7 — Decision \u0026 registration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "- **Status:** Complete"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "- **Completed:** July 2026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "- **Goal:** Officer decision and official registration in the correct register."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "- **Maps to IDEA:** Phases 18–20 (review, approve/reject, confirm registration)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "## Summary"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "Phase 7 closes the first-registration loop: after police verification confirms the address, the population officer reviews the **four core questions**, approves or rejects the case, selects a **register target**, and confirms registration. The person receives a stub **National Register number** if they do not already have one. A persistent **case audit trail** records decisions; a **&#96;RegistrationConfirmed&#96;** domain event triggers stub outbound notifications (logged)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "## Architecture"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "flowchart TB"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    subgraph OfficerUI[\"Population officer\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        Dashboard[\"ReviewDashboard\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        Decision[\"CaseDecisionSection\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        ApproveDlg[\"ApproveCaseDialog\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        RejectDlg[\"RejectCaseDialog\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    end"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    subgraph Slices[\"Web slices\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        Checklist[\"GetCaseReviewChecklist\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        Approve[\"ApproveCase\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        Reject[\"RejectCase\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        Suspend[\"SuspendCase / ResumeCase\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        Confirm[\"ConfirmRegistration\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        Audit[\"ListCaseAudit\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        Dash[\"GetReviewDashboard\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    end"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    subgraph Domain[\"Domain\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "        Case[\"RegistrationCase.Approve / Reject / ConfirmRegistration\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "        Resolver[\"RegisterTargetResolver\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        Event[\"RegistrationConfirmed\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    end"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "  Dashboard --\u003e Dash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "  Decision --\u003e Checklist"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "  Decision --\u003e Approve"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "  Decision --\u003e Reject"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  Decision --\u003e Confirm"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "  Approve --\u003e Case"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "  Confirm --\u003e Case"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "  Confirm --\u003e Event"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "  Case --\u003e Resolver"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "### Status transitions"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "| From | Action | To |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "|------|--------|-----|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "| &#96;UnderReview&#96; | Approve (full checklist + positive police) | &#96;Approved&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "| &#96;UnderReview&#96; | Reject | &#96;Rejected&#96; (terminal) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "| &#96;Intake&#96; / &#96;UnderReview&#96; | Suspend | &#96;Suspended&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "| &#96;Suspended&#96; | Resume | prior status (&#96;Intake&#96; or &#96;UnderReview&#96;) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "| &#96;Approved&#96; | Confirm registration | &#96;Registered&#96; (terminal) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "---"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 65
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/phases/phase-7-decision-registration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.23999446630477905
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "│"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "                    ┌───────▼──────┐"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "                    │   Police     │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "                    │ Verification │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "                    └───────┬──────┘"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "                            │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "                    ┌───────▼──────┐        ┌────────────────┐"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "                    │  Documents   │        │ Certificates \u0026 │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "                    │  (evidence)  │        │ Notifications  │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "                    └──────────────┘        └────────────────┘"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "**Core context:** &#96;Registration&#96; — owns the case lifecycle and ties other contexts together."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "**Supporting contexts:** provide capabilities invoked during the case; they do not silently mutate registration state without going through &#96;RegistrationCase&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "## Bounded contexts"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "### 1. Reception"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "**Purpose:** Front desk intake — reason for visit, routing, appointment (optional)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "**Key concepts:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "- &#96;VisitReason&#96; (enum): FirstRegistration, ChangeOfAddress, EUCitizenRegistration, BirthDeclaration, …"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "- &#96;ReceptionTicket&#96; (optional lightweight aggregate for queue simulation)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "**Integration:** Opening a &#96;RegistrationCase&#96; when reason is first registration."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "**Not in MVP:** appointment scheduling, queue display hardware."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "### 2. Registration (core)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "**Purpose:** Orchestrate the full first-registration procedure until the person is entered in a register or the case is rejected/suspended."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "**Aggregate:** &#96;RegistrationCase&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "| Field / concept | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "|-----------------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "| &#96;RegistrationCaseId&#96; | Strongly typed identifier |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "| &#96;Status&#96; | Lifecycle status — &#96;Intake&#96;, &#96;AwaitingPoliceVerification&#96;, … (see ARCHITECTURE.md) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "| &#96;Checklist&#96; | Computed completeness flags mirroring the four core decisions |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "| &#96;VisitReason&#96; | Why the citizen came |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "| &#96;AssignedOfficerId&#96; | Population officer |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "| &#96;PersonId&#96; | Link to identity being established |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "| &#96;ResidenceCategory&#96; | EU worker, student, refugee, … |"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 72
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 28,
            "line": 22
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/DOMAIN.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.23963063955307007
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "## Case statuses (project-specific)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "Data completeness (identity, residence, address, documents) is tracked by a **checklist** on the case, not by statuses — see ARCHITECTURE.md."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "| Status | Meaning |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "|--------|---------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "| &#96;Intake&#96; | Case open; officer collects identity, residence, address, household, and documents in any order |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "| &#96;AwaitingPoliceVerification&#96; | Sent to police for residence check |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "| &#96;UnderReview&#96; | Police result recorded; officer evaluates the four core decisions |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "| &#96;Approved&#96; | Decision positive, pending formal registration |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "| &#96;Registered&#96; | Successfully entered in register (terminal) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "| &#96;Rejected&#96; | Registration refused (terminal) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "| &#96;Suspended&#96; | Procedure paused (missing documents, investigation, …); resumable |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "## Administrations (notification stubs)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "| Body | Purpose |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "|------|---------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "| **SPF Finances / Tax** | Tax registration |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "| **Social security (RSZ/ONSS)** | Employment and benefits |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "| **Health insurance fund** | Mutuelle / ziekenfonds affiliation |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "| **Regional authorities** | Region-specific obligations |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "## Related documents"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "- [DOMAIN.md](./DOMAIN.md) — how terms map to aggregates"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "- [IDEA.md](../IDEA.md) — full process narrative"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 136
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 107
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/GLOSSARY.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.23933345079421997
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "@code {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    private bool _drawerOpen = true;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    private IReadOnlyList\u003cAppNavItem\u003e _navItems = [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    protected override void OnInitialized()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        CurrentOfficer.Changed += OnOfficerChanged;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "        _ = RefreshNavItemsAsync();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    private async Task RefreshNavItemsAsync()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "        var pendingCount = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "        try"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "            await using var scope = ScopeFactory.CreateAsyncScope();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "            var handler = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService\u003cListPendingPoliceVerificationsHandler\u003e();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "            var pending = await handler.Handle(CancellationToken.None);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "            pendingCount = pending.TotalCount;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "        catch"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "            pendingCount = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "        var items = new List\u003cAppNavItem\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "            new(\"Home\", \"/\", Icons.Material.Outlined.Home),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "            new(\"Review dashboard\", \"/registration/review-dashboard\", Icons.Material.Outlined.Dashboard),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "            new(\"Registration cases\", \"/registration/cases\", Icons.Material.Outlined.FolderOpen),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "            new("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "                \"Police verifications\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "                \"/registration/police-verifications\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "                Icons.Material.Outlined.LocalPolice,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "                OfficerRole.PoliceClerk.ToString(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "                pendingCount \u003e 0 ? pendingCount : null),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "            new("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "                \"Outbound notifications\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "                \"/administration/outbound-notifications\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "                Icons.Material.Outlined.Send,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "                OfficerRole.PopulationOfficer.ToString()),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "        };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "        if (HostEnvironment.IsDevelopment())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "            items.Add(new AppNavItem(\"Design system\", \"/design-system\", Icons.Material.Outlined.Palette));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "        _navItems = items;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    private void OnOfficerChanged()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "        _ = RefreshNavItemsAsync();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    private void ToggleDrawer() =\u003e _drawerOpen = !_drawerOpen;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "    public void Dispose()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "        CurrentOfficer.Changed -= OnOfficerChanged;"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 116
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 53
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Components/Layout/MainLayout.razor",
        "signatures": {}
