    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "namespace SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain.Registration;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "public readonly record struct OfficerId(Guid Value)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    public static OfficerId From(Guid value) =\u003e new(value);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    public override string ToString() =\u003e Value.ToString();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 8
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Registration/OfficerId.cs",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.23452305793762207
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "| **Domicile / official address** | Address recorded in the register; legal residence for admin purposes |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "| **Reference address** | Address used when person has no fixed domicile (homeless procedures) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "| **Housing situation** | Owner, tenant, living with parents, student housing, shelter, hotel, … |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "| **Household composition** | List of persons living at the same address with relationships |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "## Civil status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "| Term | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "|------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "| **Civil status** | Single, married, separated, divorced, widowed, registered partnership |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "| **Marriage recognition** | Process to recognise foreign marriage under Belgian law |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "| **Legalisation** | Authentication of foreign public document |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "| **Apostille** | Simplified legalisation (Hague Convention countries) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "## Workflow terms"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "| Term | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "|------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "| **Registration case** | Administrative file for one registration procedure (&#96;RegistrationCase&#96;) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "| **First registration** | Initial registration in Belgium |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "| **Provisional registration** | Registration pending police verification |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "| **Police residence verification** | Police confirm person lives at declared address |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "| **Immigration Office** | Federal authority for residence decisions — **stubbed** |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "| **Residence certificate** | Proof of registration / domicile issued to citizen |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "| **Household composition certificate** | Document listing household members |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "## Police verification outcomes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "| Term | Enum | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "|------|------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "| **Confirmed** | &#96;Confirmed&#96; | Person found at address |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "| **Not found** | &#96;NotFound&#96; | Person not present |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "| **Address incorrect** | &#96;AddressIncorrect&#96; | Wrong address provided |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "| **Mailbox only** | &#96;MailboxOnly&#96; | Only mailbox, not actually residing |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "| **Empty dwelling** | &#96;EmptyDwelling&#96; | No one living at address |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "| **Refused access** | &#96;RefusedAccess&#96; | Police could not enter / verify |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "| **Incomplete** | &#96;Incomplete&#96; | Needs second visit |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "## Case statuses (project-specific)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "Data completeness (identity, residence, address, documents) is tracked by a **checklist** on the case, not by statuses — see ARCHITECTURE.md."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 110
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 69
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/GLOSSARY.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2241804003715515
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "## Residence documents (simplified)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\u003e **Accuracy disclaimer:** descriptions below are simplified for this educational project. Belgian residence card letters were reorganised in 2021 (C→K, D→L, E→EU, E+→EU+). Verify against official Immigration Office (IBZ/DVZ) sources before encoding legal rules as code."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "| Term | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "|------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "| **A Card** | Limited-duration residence permit (non-EU) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "| **B Card** | Unlimited-duration residence permit (non-EU) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "| **EU / EU+ Card** | Registration certificate / permanent residence for EU citizens (formerly E / E+) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "| **F / F+ Card** | Family member of an EU or Belgian citizen (F+ = permanent) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "| **H Card** | European Blue Card (highly skilled worker) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "| **K Card** | Settled status (formerly C card) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "| **L Card** | EU long-term resident (formerly D card) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "| **Annex 15, 19, 19ter, 20, 25, 26, 35** | Immigration Office annex documents with distinct legal meanings |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "| **Visa D** | Long-stay visa |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "| **Visa C** | Short-stay visa |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "| **Electronic residence card** | Chip card with PIN/PUK |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "## Residence categories"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "| Term | Enum | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "|------|------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "| **EU citizen** | &#96;EuCitizen&#96; | Freedom of movement; lighter documentation |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "| **Non-EU worker** | &#96;NonEuWorker&#96; | Employment-based stay |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "| **Student** | &#96;Student&#96; | Study purpose |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "| **Researcher** | &#96;Researcher&#96; | Research appointment |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "| **Family reunification** | &#96;FamilyReunification&#96; | Joining family member legally in Belgium |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "| **Highly skilled worker** | &#96;HighlySkilledWorker&#96; | EU Blue Card / skilled migration |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "| **Diplomat** | &#96;Diplomat&#96; | Special registration rules |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "| **Refugee** | &#96;Refugee&#96; | Recognised refugee status |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "| **Subsidiary protection** | &#96;SubsidiaryProtection&#96; | Alternative protection status |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "| **Temporary protection** | &#96;TemporaryProtection&#96; | e.g. mass displacement schemes |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "| **Cross-border worker** | &#96;CrossBorderWorker&#96; | Lives abroad, works in Belgium |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "## Address \u0026 housing"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "| Term | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "|------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "| **Domicile / official address** | Address recorded in the register; legal residence for admin purposes |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "| **Reference address** | Address used when person has no fixed domicile (homeless procedures) |"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 71
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 30
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/GLOSSARY.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.22244490683078766
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "    Task\u003cRegistrationCase?\u003e GetByIdAsync(RegistrationCaseId id, CancellationToken ct);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "    Task AddAsync(RegistrationCase registrationCase, CancellationToken ct);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "    Task SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken ct);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "Implementation in &#96;Infrastructure/Persistence/&#96;. No generic &#96;IRepository\u003cT\u003e&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "All repositories share the scoped &#96;DbContext&#96;, so a handler that touches two aggregates (e.g. &#96;RecordPoliceResult&#96; updates both the verification request and the case) still commits atomically with a single &#96;SaveChangesAsync&#96; at the end of the handler."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "## Registration case lifecycle"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "The aggregate combines a **small status machine** with a **computed completeness checklist**. Real intake is not linear — an officer collects identity, residence category, address, household, and documents in whatever order the conversation allows — so **data collection does not advance statuses; decisions do**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "**Statuses:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "Intake"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "  → AwaitingPoliceVerification"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "  → UnderReview"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "  → Approved → Registered (terminal success)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "UnderReview → Rejected (terminal)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "Intake / UnderReview ⇄ Suspended (paused, resumable)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "**Completeness checklist** — computed from case data, mirroring the four core decisions:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "| Flag | True when |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "|------|-----------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "| &#96;IdentityEstablished&#96; | Minimum identity data recorded and officer-confirmed |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "| &#96;LegalResidenceEstablished&#96; | Residence category set and permit evidence passes policy |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "| &#96;AddressDeclared&#96; / &#96;AddressConfirmed&#96; | Address declared / positive police result recorded |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "| &#96;RegisterDeterminable&#96; | Category and outcome map to a register target |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "**Data-recording methods** work during &#96;Intake&#96; (corrections also allowed during &#96;UnderReview&#96;); they update checklist flags without changing status:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;csharp"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "public void RecordIdentity(IdentityDetails identity, OfficerId officer)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "public void DeclareAddress(BelgianAddress address, HousingSituation situation)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "**Guarded transitions** enforce the checklist:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;csharp"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "public void RequestPoliceVerification()  // requires IdentityEstablished + AddressDeclared"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "public void RecordPoliceResult(PoliceVerificationResult result)  // → UnderReview"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 268
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 220
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ARCHITECTURE.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.21643853187561035
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "| &#96;PersonId&#96; | Link to identity being established |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "| &#96;ResidenceCategory&#96; | EU worker, student, refugee, … |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "| &#96;DeclaredAddress&#96; | Address pending confirmation |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "| &#96;RegisterTarget&#96; | Population / Foreigners / Waiting / Special register |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "| &#96;OpenedAt&#96;, &#96;ClosedAt&#96; | Timestamps |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "| &#96;AuditTrail&#96; | Collection of &#96;CaseAuditEntry&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "**Domain invariants (examples):**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "- Cannot move to &#96;AwaitingPoliceVerification&#96; unless &#96;IdentityEstablished&#96; and &#96;AddressDeclared&#96; are true."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "- Cannot &#96;Approve&#96; while police result is negative or missing (unless policy exception flagged), or while any checklist flag is unresolved."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "- Cannot &#96;ConfirmRegistration&#96; without &#96;Approved&#96; status."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "- Data-recording methods (identity, address, civil status, …) never advance the status — they only update checklist flags."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "- Duplicate open case for same person identity fingerprint → domain exception."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "**Use cases (slices):**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "| Slice | Maps to IDEA phase |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "|-------|-------------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "| &#96;OpenRegistrationCase&#96; | Phase 1–2 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "| &#96;RecordIdentity&#96; | Phase 2 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "| &#96;SetResidenceCategory&#96; | Phase 3 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "| &#96;RecordResidencePermit&#96; | Phase 4 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "| &#96;DeclareAddress&#96; | Phase 5–6 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "| &#96;RecordHouseholdComposition&#96; | Phase 7 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "| &#96;RecordCivilStatus&#96; | Phase 8 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "| &#96;AttachDocument&#96; | Phase 12 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "| &#96;SearchNationalRegister&#96; | Phase 13–14 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "| &#96;RequestPoliceVerification&#96; | Phase 15 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "| &#96;RecordPoliceResult&#96; | Phase 17 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "| &#96;ReviewCase&#96; / &#96;ApproveCase&#96; / &#96;RejectCase&#96; | Phase 18 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "| &#96;ConfirmRegistration&#96; | Phase 19–20 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "### 3. Identity \u0026 civil status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "**Purpose:** Establish who the person is and civil status facts."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "**Aggregates:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "- &#96;Person&#96; — legal name, birth facts, sex, nationalities, previous names"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "- &#96;CivilStatusRecord&#96; — single, married, divorced, … with supporting marriage recognition status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "**Value objects:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "- &#96;FullName&#96;, &#96;BirthPlace&#96;, &#96;Nationality&#96;, &#96;PreviousName&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "**Integration:** Registration case records identity snapshot; &#96;Person&#96; may exist before full registration (BIS scenario)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "**Exceptions from IDEA:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "- Missing birth certificate → case &#96;Suspended&#96;, document requests"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 123
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 70
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/DOMAIN.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.21353240311145782
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    end"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    opt Blazor dialog"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        Client--\u003e\u003eClient: Navigate to /registration/cases/{caseId}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    end"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "## Call chain"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "RegistrationCaseList.razor"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "  └─ OpenNewCaseDialog()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "       └─ NewCaseDialog.razor → Submit()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "            └─ OpenRegistrationCaseHandler.Handle(request)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "                 ├─ OpenRegistrationCaseValidator.ValidateAndThrowAsync()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "                 ├─ ICurrentOfficer.OfficerId (default assignee)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "                 ├─ TimeProvider.GetUtcNow()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "                 ├─ RegistrationCase.Open(...)          [Domain]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "                 ├─ IRegistrationCaseRepository.AddAsync()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "                 └─ IRegistrationCaseRepository.SaveChangesAsync()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "## Domain logic"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "&#96;RegistrationCase.Open()&#96; factory method:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "- Generates a new &#96;RegistrationCaseId&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "- Sets status to &#96;Intake&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "- Initializes an empty checklist"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "- Records visit reason, assigned officer, and timestamp"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "No domain events are raised in the current implementation."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "## Validation rules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "| Field | Rule |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "|-------|------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "| &#96;VisitReason&#96; | Must be a valid enum value |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "## Request example"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "  \"visitReason\": \"FirstRegistration\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "  \"assignedOfficerId\": null"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "When &#96;assignedOfficerId&#96; is null, the current officer from &#96;ICurrentOfficer&#96; is used."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "## Error responses (HTTP)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "| Status | Condition |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "|--------|-----------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "| &#96;400&#96; | Validation failure (invalid visit reason) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "| &#96;201&#96; | Success |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "## Dependencies"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "| Dependency | Role |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "|------------|------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "| &#96;IRegistrationCaseRepository&#96; | Persist new case |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "| &#96;ICurrentOfficer&#96; | Default officer assignment |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "| &#96;TimeProvider&#96; | Consistent UTC timestamps |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "| &#96;IValidator\u003cOpenRegistrationCaseRequest\u003e&#96; | Input validation |"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 121
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 56
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/features/registration/open-registration-case.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.21111999452114105
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Phase 1 — Case intake \u0026 identity"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "- **Status:** Complete"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "- **Completed:** July 2026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "- **Goal:** Open a registration case and record identity with document upload."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "## Summary"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "Phase 1 delivers the first vertical slice through all layers: officers can open an intake case, record citizen identity, and attach supporting documents. The domain model introduces the completeness checklist (&#96;IdentityEstablished&#96; first), &#96;Person&#96; and &#96;AdministrativeDocument&#96; aggregates, and guarded transitions via &#96;InvalidRegistrationTransitionException&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "## Deliverables checklist"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "| Deliverable | Status | Notes |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "|-------------|--------|-------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "| &#96;OpenRegistrationCase&#96; slice | Done | Handler, validator, endpoint, dialog |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "| &#96;ListRegistrationCases&#96; / &#96;GetRegistrationCase&#96; | Done | List enhanced; detail DTO with checklist |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "| &#96;RecordIdentity&#96; slice | Done | Creates &#96;Person&#96;, marks checklist |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "| &#96;AttachDocument&#96; slice | Done | Local file storage + metadata |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "| &#96;RegistrationCase&#96; checklist | Done | Owned type on case; &#96;IdentityEstablished&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "| &#96;Person&#96; aggregate | Done | Name, DOB, nationality |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "| &#96;AdministrativeDocument&#96; | Done | Type, path, hash, officer |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "| Case list page | Done | New case button, identity column |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "| Case detail page | Done | Checklist, identity form, documents |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "| Document upload component | Done | &#96;MudFileUpload&#96; + handler |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "| FluentValidation | Done | Open case + record identity + attach |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "| Domain tests | Done | 4 tests — transitions + checklist |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "| Integration tests | Done | Open + record identity + API |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "| PostgreSQL migration job | Done | &#96;ci-postgres.yml&#96;, &#96;Category=PostgreSQL&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "| EF migration &#96;CaseIntakeAndIdentity&#96; | Done | Extends &#96;registration_cases&#96;; adds tables |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "## Domain changes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "### &#96;RegistrationCase&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "- &#96;Open(visitReason, assignedOfficer, openedAt)&#96; replaces bare &#96;Create()&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "- &#96;RecordIdentity(identity)&#96; creates a &#96;Person&#96;, links &#96;PersonId&#96;, sets &#96;Checklist.IdentityEstablished&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "- &#96;EnsureCanAttachDocuments()&#96; guards document upload during &#96;Intake&#96; or &#96;UnderReview&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "- Data recording does **not** advance status — case stays &#96;Intake&#96;."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 45
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/phases/phase-1-case-intake-identity.md",

          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "The municipality requests residence verification."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "Actor:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "Local police."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "Police verify:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "Does the person actually live there?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "Possible outcomes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "Confirmed."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 439,
            "text": "Not found."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 440
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441,
            "text": "Address incorrect."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 442
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "Mailbox only."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445,
            "text": "Empty dwelling."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447,
            "text": "Unknown resident."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449,
            "text": "Moved already."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 450
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 451,
            "text": "Refused access."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 452
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 453,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 454
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 455,
            "text": "# Phase 16 — Waiting Period"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 456
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 457,
            "text": "During police verification:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 458
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 459,
            "text": "Registration usually remains provisional."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 460
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 461,
            "text": "Certain certificates may be unavailable."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 462
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 463,
            "text": "The citizen waits."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 464
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 465,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467,
            "text": "# Phase 17 — Police Report Returns"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 468
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469,
            "text": "Possible results:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471,
            "text": "Positive."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 472
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473,
            "text": "Negative."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475,
            "text": "Incomplete."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "Requires second visit."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "Officer observations become part of the administrative decision."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483,
            "text": "# Phase 18 — Decision"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485,
            "text": "Population officer evaluates:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 486
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487,
            "text": "Identity confirmed?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 489,
            "text": "Residence legal?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "Address confirmed?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 493,
            "text": "Documents complete?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 494
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 495,
            "text": "If yes:"

          },
          {

          },

          },

            "text": "Request additional documents."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 502
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 503,
            "text": "Suspend procedure."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 504
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 505,
            "text": "Reject registration."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 506
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 507,
            "text": "Refer to Immigration Office."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 508
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 509,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 510
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 511,
            "text": "# Phase 19 — Official Registration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 512
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 513,
            "text": "The citizen enters one of:"

          {
            "lineNumber": 514
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 515,

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 518
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 519,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 520
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 521,
            "text": "Special Register"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 522
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 523,
            "text": "The chosen register depends entirely on legal residence status."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 524
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 525,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 526
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 527,
            "text": "# Phase 20 — National Register Update"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 528
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 529,
            "text": "Core information now exists:"

          {

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 538
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 540
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 541,
            "text": "Residence status"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 543,
            "text": "National Register number"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 544
          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 548
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 549,
            "text": "# Phase 21 — Residence Card Production"

          {
            "lineNumber": 550
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 551,

          },

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 566
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 567,
            "text": "# Phase 22 — Other Administrations Are Informed"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 568
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 569,
            "text": "Information propagates automatically to various public bodies depending on the person's situation, such as tax, social security, health insurance, regional authorities, and other government services that rely on the National Register."
          },

          },

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
ReceptionOfficer currently has no code-level permission restrictions. It remains purely conceptual.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

The app defines **three** roles in the role switcher, but only **two** are labeled “officer”: **Reception officer** and **Population officer** (the third is **Police clerk**). Here is how the two officer roles differ — in the real-world workflow and in the current code.

## Intended workflow difference

From the project glossary and domain docs:

| | **Reception officer** | **Population officer** |
|---|---|---|
| **Code** | `OfficerRole.ReceptionOfficer` | `OfficerRole.PopulationOfficer` |
| **Purpose** | Front desk — figure out why the citizen came and route them | Full registration case work — identity, residence, address, decision |
| **Typical actions** | Determine visit reason, open/route cases | Record intake data, send to police, approve/reject/suspend, issue certificates |

In the municipal workflow (`IDEA.md`), reception happens first (“determines the reason for the visit” and directs first-time registrants to the Population/Foreigners office). Population officers then take over for identity verification and the rest of the case.

## Difference in the app today

The **Population officer** role has real permission checks. The **Reception officer** role is mostly a placeholder so far.

**Population officer only:**

- `CanApproveRegistration` is `true` only for this role:

```11:11:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Auth/CurrentOfficer.cs
    public bool CanApproveRegistration => Role == OfficerRole.PopulationOfficer;
```

- That gates case **decisions**: approve, reject, suspend, resume, and confirm registration (handlers like `ApproveCaseHandler`, `RejectCaseHandler`, etc.).
- The **Decision** section on a case only appears when `CanApproveRegistration` is true (`CaseDecisionSection.razor`).
- The **Outbound notifications** nav item is restricted to Population officers (`MainLayout.razor`).

**Reception officer:**

- No handler or UI checks reference `ReceptionOfficer` anywhere except the role switcher and display name (“Jean Martin (Reception)”).
- A reception officer can currently do most of the same things as a population officer **except** final decisions and outbound notifications.

**Shared access (both officer roles):**

- Home, Review dashboard, Registration cases
- Opening cases, intake steps (identity, address, documents, etc.)
- Police verification list is visible, but recording results is restricted to **Police clerk**, not either officer role

## Summary

- **Conceptually:** Reception = front desk routing; Population = end-to-end registration and official decisions.
- **In code:** Population officer is the only role that can approve/reject/suspend cases and see outbound notifications. Reception officer exists in the enum but has no exclusive permissions yet — it reflects the intended future “Reception” bounded context more than a enforced restriction today.

If you meant a different pair (e.g. **Population officer vs Police clerk**, or **`OfficerRole` vs `OfficerId`**), say which and I can compare those instead.
